name: Spicy Lentil & Pepper Sauce for Pasta or Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Green and red bell pepper, finely chopped
2 Cooked, peeled hot chilies, finely minced (canned or fresh)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep pot, saut onions, garlic, and peppers in heated olive oil.
2. Stir often over medium heat until the onions are translucent.
3. Cover and reduce heat to low. Add diced tomato and vegetable juice.
4. Simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in pre-cooked lentils and seasonings (including minced chilies).
6. Heat thoroughly before serving. If the mixture seems too dry at any time, add a few spoonfuls of water.
7. Serve sauce over cooked pasta or brown rice.
Total Calories Per Serving (without pasta): 145
Fat: 4 grams
